programmes.show_description: A car accident leads the detectives on a search for an ambulance driver assaulting his charges; Fin gives Detective Bruno a tour of Manhattan SVU.
A recently released convict goes looking for his arresting officer, Fin Tutuola; Carisi tries to get an arrest warrant without a positive suspect ID.
Police drama series. Hetty puts Callen's safety ahead of her own. The team swoop into Romania to save her, but the unexpected appearance of Agent Hunter raises questions.
Dylan and Lizzie investigate the deaths of family members who were also business partners in a craft brewery. Andy's legal expertise is needed for an issue in the adoption process.
A little rain doesn't stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man's professed distrust of banks.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence.
Eddie's judgment is clouded when she arrests a loathed college acquaintance. Frank is hesitant to mar the spotless record of a member of the force who tested positive for marijuana.
Danny and Baez join a narcotics task force to track a drug supplier. Jamie and Eddie work to protect a rehabilitated sex offender. Frank forms an unlikely alliance with Mayor Dutton.
Jamie and Eddie ask Erin to drop the charges against a man who bravely rescued a woman from a local hostage situation. Danny and Baez work a case involving car thieves.
When a journalist disappears while working on an expose about an innocent man serving time for murder, Danny and Baez hope that re-examining the original case will help them find her.
Erin enlists Danny to find out who shot Anthony when he was searching for a witness for an upcoming murder trial.
Specialised police drama series. When an attempt is made on the life of a key witness from the Sudan campaign, the team must find those responsible.
Police drama series. Callen and Sam go undercover to find out who hijacked a diplomatic van transporting an unknown package from the State Department.
Specialised police drama series. The team try to catch a deadly master of disguise, but the case is complicated by Granger's involvement.
Specialised police drama series. Shockwaves ripple through the team when Kensi is taken into custody as the lead suspect in the murder of a marine.
Crime drama series. As the team continue trying to clear her name, Blye sets out on her own to find her father's killer.
Crime drama series. The team try to establish whether a shooting outside the Vietnamese consulate is an isolated incident or a terrorist attack.
Specialised police drama series. The murder of an intelligence officer leads Callen and the team to a group of SEALs, who are about to embark on a hostage rescue mission.
A gruesome discovery in a city pond leads Dylan and Lizzie to investigate a young man's murder, while Andy rescues one of Dylan's students from a legal bind, in the series finale.
A cryptic message sends SVU on a new track to find Maddie. Benson tries to help a federal agent when the case hits too close to home. Capt. Curry tries to make amends with Fin.
The SVU must track down a mysterious suspect targeting tourists staying in hostels and race to identify one woman's attacker before she opts to go home.
A man with dementia confesses to murder, but Benson and Carisi believe there's more to the case. When rumors swirl around the squad room, Fin presses Velasco for the truth.
An internet dating site becomes the source of terror for a young widow. Muncy struggles with Velasco's absence.
Goren and Eames probe the murder of a dentist who was smothered in his surgical chair. The case is soon connected to a batch of counterfeit mouthwash.
The discovery of a woman's body tied up with complex knots leads the detectives to a lonely writer researching the dating scene.
A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain.
Charlie Garrett's outrageous bid at an auction arouses Jessica's suspicions after the artist becomes the subject of a homicide.
Gary and Larry's accountant is found dead. Then $750,000 earmarked for Jessica's Literacy Fund is found missing. It's up to Jessica to find the killer.
Jessica finds herself in contempt of a federal grand jury after she is subpoenaed to testify in a hearing over a corrupt investment firm and the key witness dies.
When Henry is the key witness on Danny and Baez's case, his meddling eventually leads them to valuable information. Nicky shocks the family by siding with an activist friend of hers.
When a student is shot by a rival gang member in his high school courtyard, Danny and Baez try to prevent further violence. But the head recklessly takes matters into his own hands.
Danny considers taking a new job that would ease his financial struggles after investigating the death of a wealthy man.
A man living a double life with two separate families is murdered. Erin asks Anthony to help investigate his former partner. Frank deliberates between two candidates.
Danny forces his brother-in-law to help Baez take down the mobsters he's mixed up with. Frank suspects his old partner is guilty of a crime.
Specialised police drama series. The team work with operational psychologist Nate Getz and the FBI to stop a domestic terrorist.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Specialised police drama series. Danny and Chin-Ho from the Hawaii Five-0 unit help Sam and Callen track a wayward immunologist who plans to release a deadly virus.
Specialised police drama series. Kensi and Deeks face a tricky assignment when they must pose as a married couple in order to find a Russian sleeper cell.
Specialised police drama series. Callen and the team are lured into a deadly game of cat and mouse when the Chameleon returns.
Specialised police drama series. As the Chameleon continues to put his plan into practice, Callen breaks rank with the team and goes rogue.
When a woman turns her husband in for possessing child pornography, the case is complicated by a sudden death. Benson tries to reconnect with a victim she saved.
